# programs.hyprland-qt-support

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.hyprland-qt-support`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.hyprland-qt-support.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Hyprland Qt support, a Qt6 QML style provider for hypr\* apps. |
| `programs.hyprland-qt-support.package` | `null or package` | The hyprland-qt-support package to use. |
| `programs.hyprland-qt-support.settings` | `Hyprland configuration value` | Hyprland Qt Support configuration written in Nix. See <https://wiki.hypr.land/Hypr-Ecosystem/hyprland-qt-support/> for more examples. |
